    📖 Educations

    • 2017 - 2021: B.Eng. in Computer Science, ShanghaiTech University, China.
      • Overall GPA: 3.53 / 4.0.

    📝 Publications

    • Motion-Aware Optical Camera Communication with Event Cameras
      Su, H., Gao, L., Liu, T., Kneip, L.
      IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L). 2024.

    • An N-Point Linear Solver for Line and Motion Estimation with Event Cameras (Oral)

      IEEE Conf. Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR). 2024.

    • A 5-Point Minimal Solver for Event Camera Relative Motion Estimation (Oral)
      Gao, L.*, Su, H.*, Gehrig, D., Cannici, M., Scaramuzza, D., Kneip, L.
      IEEE Int. Conf. Computer Vision (ICCV), 2023.

    • Denoised internal models: a brain-inspired autoencoder against adversarial attacks.
      Liu, K. Y., Li, X. Y., Lai, Y. R., Su, H., Wang, J. C., Guo, C. X., Xie, H., Guan, J. S., Zhou, Y.
